task: image->text recall@1, 4 distractors, chance=0.2, bootstrap 95% CI
environment: local CPU, transformers 5.12.1 + torch 2.12.1+cpu, joint-space projected embeds

rungs.perceptionNote: structured-caption stand-in — measures harness, not pixels

finding: SigLIP (0.531) > CLIP (0.306) > chance (0.2) on these abstract rectangle renderings. Scenes are OOD for natural-image encoders, so recall is modestly-above-chance (honest, expected); SigLIP separates better, consistent with its retrieval reputation. The hashing rung (1.0) measures harness/caption separability, NOT pixels.
claimStatus: Real encoder result on a synthetic-render suite; NOT a headline VLM capability claim. A natural-image probe set would rank encoders for production.
